_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Ensure that appropriate SLAs and underpinning contracts have been defined that clearly set out for the customer a description of the service and the measures for monitoring the service.
reference_document_element_description: Manage data service level agreements with internal consumers, including SLA definition, performance measurement, breach reporting, and service improvement planning.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI OP domain. OP-T-011 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DQ-S-008 (DQ, cosine: 0.571), DQ-T-012 (DQ, cosine: 0.536).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.1/10 (raw 0.610). Shared vocabulary: [service]. DCWF-only terms [appropriate, clearly, contracts, customer, defined, description] vs WIDAI-only terms [agreements, breach, consumers, data, definition, improvement] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.873 (P=0.869, R=0.876). Balanced P/R — the 29-word DCWF element and 19-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Ensure that appropriate SLAs and underpinning contracts have been defined that c" and "Manage data service level agreements with internal consumers, including SLA defi" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.601 ≈ STS 0.610 (gap 0.010). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [service] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 5.3%. Shared tokens: [service]. DCWF-only: [appropriate, clearly, contracts, customer, defined, description]. WIDAI-only: [agreements, breach, consumers, data, definition, improvement].
